title: 在不确定性中航行的工程自信
description: 在16.85自主系统顶点课程（自主飞行器的设计与测试）中，航空航天系的学生们开发软件，使自主飞行器能够在未知环境中导航。
titleZh: 在不确定性中航行的工程自信
titleEn: Engineering Confidence Navigating Uncertainty
descriptionZh: 在16.85自主系统顶点课程（自主飞行器的设计与测试）中，航空航天系的学生们开发软件，使自主飞行器能够在未知环境中导航。
descriptionEn: In the 16.85 Autonomous Systems capstone course (Design and Testing of Autonomous Aircraft), students in the Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics develop software that enables autonomous aircraft to navigate in unknown environments.

title: 编程方法的奇点，程序员的“执行门槛”在望，软件的 YouTube 时刻正在发生
description: 当构建应用程序的边际成本接近于零时，软件就会像短视频一样激增：每个人都成为开发者，每个人都可以拥有自己专属的“微软件帝国”。
titleZh: 编程方法的奇点，程序员的“执行门槛”在望，软件的 YouTube 时刻正在发生
titleEn: The Singularity of Programming Approaches, the Programmer's "Execution Threshold" is in Sight, Software's YouTube Moment is Happening
descriptionZh: 当构建应用程序的边际成本接近于零时，软件就会像短视频一样激增：每个人都成为开发者，每个人都可以拥有自己专属的“微软件帝国”。
descriptionEn: When the marginal cost of building apps approaches zero, software will proliferate like short videos: everyone becomes a developer, and each person can own their exclusive "micro-software empire."

title: 19岁神童愤怒离开OpenAI，揭露国防合同的血腥秘密；
description: 奥特曼摊牌了：OpenAI正式与五角大楼签订合同，价值只有几百万美元——与它超过200亿美元的年收入相比，微不足道！
titleZh: 19岁神童愤怒离开OpenAI，揭露国防合同的血腥秘密；
titleEn: 19-Year-Old Prodigy Leaves OpenAI in Anger, Exposing Bloody Secrets of Defense Contracts; AI Becomes a War Nightmare
descriptionZh: 奥特曼摊牌了：OpenAI正式与五角大楼签订合同，价值只有几百万美元——与它超过200亿美元的年收入相比，微不足道！
descriptionEn: Altman lays his cards on the table: OpenAI officially signs a contract with the Pentagon, worth only a few million dollars—insignificant compared to its annual revenue of over $20 billion! Additionally, OpenAI's models may be used in drone swarm experiments.

title: 红包停止，增长为零？
description: 令人震惊的是，为了在人工智能领域占据一席之地，一场战斗就投入了 45 亿美元。
titleZh: 红包停止，增长为零？
titleEn: Red Envelopes Stop, Growth Hits Zero? The Truth and Hidden Concerns Behind the Spring Festival AI Battle
descriptionZh: 令人震惊的是，为了在人工智能领域占据一席之地，一场战斗就投入了 45 亿美元。
descriptionEn: A staggering 4.5 billion was thrown down, all for a single battle to secure a position in AI. On the surface, it's a fight for traffic and mindshare, but at a deeper level, it represents another divergence in the technological paths of China and the US. This nationwide experiment proves that the success of Chinese AI requires not only technological "depth" but also the "breadth" of application scenarios.
